critical_issues.description: 'aws.ec2.ebs.public_snapshot_configured' contains 'public' but checks Encrypted field (encryption vs public access are different)
critical_issues.problem: 'aws.ec2.ebs.public_snapshot_configured' contains 'public' but checks Encrypted field (encryption vs public access are different)
critical_issues.impact: HIGH - Rule may check wrong field (encryption vs public access)
critical_issues.recommendation: Verify rule intent - if checking public access, should use describe_snapshot_attribute API with createVolumePermission, not Encrypted field
